metadata.discovered_via: rulespec-us Rhode Island TY2026 resident income-tax end-to-end review
metadata.source_authority: Rhode Island Department of Revenue, Division of Taxation
metadata.source_note: Official Division of Taxation advisory publishing the Tax Year 2026 personal-income-tax brackets and rates, filing-status standard deductions, personal and dependency exemption amount, deduction and exemption phaseout range, and phaseout increment. The advisory separately reports Tax Year 2025 Social Security, retirement-income, and property-tax-relief parameters; those values are not 2026 authority.
metadata.title: ADV 2025-22: Inflation-adjusted amounts set for Tax Year 2026
